verses.latin_vulgate: Primo tempore alleviata est  terra Zabulon et terra Nephthali :  et novissimo aggravata est via maris  trans Jordanem Galilææ gentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לֹ֣א מוּעָף֮ לַאֲשֶׁ֣ר מוּצָ֣ק לָהּ֒ כָּעֵ֣ת הָרִאשׁ֗וֹן הֵקַ֞ל אַ֤רְצָה זְבֻלוּן֙ וְאַ֣רְצָה נַפְתָּלִ֔י וְהָאַחֲר֖וֹן הִכְבִּ֑יד דֶּ֤רֶךְ הַיָּם֙ עֵ֣בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן גְּלִ֖יל הַגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: At the first time the land of Zabulon, and the land of Nephtali was lightly touched: and at the last the way of the sea beyond the Jordan of the Galilee of the Gentiles was heavily loaded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ei ole sillä (maakunnalla) yhtään pääsinpäivää, koska hän ahdistuksessa on; niinkuin entiseen aikaan Sebulonin ja Naphtalin maalle lievitys tapahtui, ja tulivat viimein kunnioitetuksi; niin myös ne meritien vieressä, tällä puolella Jordanin pakanain Galileassa.
verses.king_james: Nevertheless the dimness shall not be such as was in her vexation, when at the first he lightly afflicted the land of Zebulun and the land of Naphtali, and afterward did more grievously afflict her by the way of the sea, beyond Jordan, in Galilee of the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populus qui ambulabat in tenebris,  vidit lucem magnam ;  habitantibus in regione umbræ mortis,  lux orta est eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָעָם֙ הַהֹלְכִ֣ים בַּחֹ֔שֶׁךְ רָא֖וּ א֣וֹר גָּד֑וֹל יֹֽשְׁבֵי֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ צַלְמָ֔וֶת א֖וֹר נָגַ֥הּ עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The people that walked in darkness, have seen a great light: to them that dwelt in the region of the shadow of death, light is risen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kansa, joka pimeydessä vaelsi, näki suuren valkeuden, ja jotka asuivat kuoleman varjon maassa, niiden ylitse se kirkkaasti paistaa.
verses.king_james: The people that walked in darkness have seen a great light: they that dwell in the land of the shadow of death, upon them hath the light shined.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicasti gentem,  et non magnificasti lætitiam.  Lætabuntur coram te, sicut qui lætantur in messe ;  sicut exsultant victores capta præda, quando dividunt spolia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִרְבִּ֣יתָ הַגּ֔וֹי (לא) [ל֖וֹ] הִגְדַּ֣לְתָּ הַשִּׂמְחָ֑ה שָׂמְח֤וּ לְפָנֶ֙יךָ֙ כְּשִׂמְחַ֣ת בַּקָּצִ֔יר כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר יָגִ֖ילוּ בְּחַלְּקָ֥ם שָׁלָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast multiplied the nation, and hast not increased the joy. They shall rejoice before thee, as they that rejoice in the harvest, as conquerors rejoice after taking a prey, when they divide the spoils.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä lisäät kansaa, ja lisäät hänelle iloa; sinun edessäs iloitaan, niinkuin elonaikana iloitaan, niinkuin saaliin jaossa iloitaan:
verses.king_james: Thou hast multiplied the nation, and not increased the joy: they joy before thee according to the joy in harvest, and as men rejoice when they divide the spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jugum enim oneris ejus,  et virgam humeri ejus,  et sceptrum exactoris ejus  superasti, sicut in die Madian.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ׀ אֶת־עֹ֣ל סֻבֳּל֗וֹ וְאֵת֙ מַטֵּ֣ה שִׁכְמ֔וֹ שֵׁ֖בֶט הַנֹּגֵ֣שׂ בּ֑וֹ הַחִתֹּ֖תָ כְּי֥וֹם מִדְיָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the yoke of their burden, and the rod of their shoulder, and the sceptre of their oppressor thou hast overcome, as in the day of Madian.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä olet heidän kuormansa ikeen, heidän olkainsa vitsan, ja heidän vaatiansa sauvan särkenyt, niinkuin Midianin aikana.
verses.king_james: For thou hast broken the yoke of his burden, and the staff of his shoulder, the rod of his oppressor, as in the day of Midian.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia omnis violentia prædatio cum tumultu,  et vestimentum mistum sanguine,  erit in combustionem,  et cibus ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י כׇל־סְאוֹן֙ סֹאֵ֣ן בְּרַ֔עַשׁ וְשִׂמְלָ֖ה מְגוֹלָלָ֣ה בְדָמִ֑ים וְהָיְתָ֥ה לִשְׂרֵפָ֖ה מַאֲכֹ֥לֶת אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For every violent taking of spoils, with tumult, and garment mingled with blood, shall be burnt, and be fuel for the fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kaikki sota ja meteli, ja veriset vaatteet pitää poltettaman ja tulella kulutettaman.
verses.king_james: For every battle of the warrior is with confused noise, and garments rolled in blood; but this shall be with burning and fuel of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Parvulus enim natus est nobis,  et filius datus est nobis,  et factus est principatus super humerum ejus :  et vocabitur nomen ejus,  Admirabilis, Consiliarius, Deus, Fortis,  Pater futuri sæculi, Princeps pacis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יֶ֣לֶד יֻלַּד־לָ֗נוּ בֵּ֚ן נִתַּן־לָ֔נוּ וַתְּהִ֥י הַמִּשְׂרָ֖ה עַל־שִׁכְמ֑וֹ וַיִּקְרָ֨א שְׁמ֜וֹ פֶּ֠לֶא יוֹעֵץ֙ אֵ֣ל גִּבּ֔וֹר אֲבִי־עַ֖ד שַׂר־שָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For a CHILD IS BORN to us, and a son is given to us, and the government is upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, God the Mighty, the Father of the world to come, the Prince of Peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä meille on lapsi syntynyt, ja poika on meille annettu, jonka hartioilla herraus on; ja hänen nimensä kutsutaan Ihmeellinen, Neuvonantaja, Väkevä Jumala, Ijankaikkinen Isä, Rauhan päämies:
verses.king_james: For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicabitur ejus imperium,  et pacis non erit finis ;  super solium David, et super regnum ejus sedebit,  ut confirmet illud et corroboret  in judicio et justitia,  amodo et usque in sempiternum :  zelus Domini exercituum faciet hoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (לם רבה) [לְמַרְבֵּ֨ה] הַמִּשְׂרָ֜ה וּלְשָׁל֣וֹם אֵֽין־קֵ֗ץ עַל־כִּסֵּ֤א דָוִד֙ וְעַל־מַמְלַכְתּ֔וֹ לְהָכִ֤ין אֹתָהּ֙ וּֽלְסַעֲדָ֔הּ בְּמִשְׁפָּ֖ט וּבִצְדָקָ֑ה מֵֽעַתָּה֙ וְעַד־עוֹלָ֔ם קִנְאַ֛ת יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת תַּעֲשֶׂה־זֹּֽאת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: His empire shall be multiplied, and there shall be no end of peace: he shall sit upon the throne of David, and upon his kingdom; to establish it and strengthen it with judgment and with justice, from henceforth and for ever: the zeal of the Lord of hosts will perform this.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että hänen herrautensa pitää suureksi tuleman, ja ei rauhalla loppua, Davidin istuimelle ja hänen valtakunnallensa, valmistamaan sitä ja vahvistamaan tuomiolla ja vanhurskaudella: hamasta nyt niin ijankaikkiseen on Herran Jumalan Zebaotin kiivaus tämän tekevä.
verses.king_james: Of the increase of his government and peace there shall be no end, upon the throne of David, and upon his kingdom, to order it, and to establish it with judgment and with justice from henceforth even for ever. The zeal of the Lord of hosts will perform this.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum misit Dominus in Jacob,  et cecidit in Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דָּבָ֛ר שָׁלַ֥ח אֲדֹנָ֖י בְּיַעֲקֹ֑ב וְנָפַ֖ל בְּיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord sent a word into Jacob, and it hath lighted upon Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on lähettänyt sanan Jakobissa, ja se on langennut Israelissa;
verses.king_james: The Lord sent a word into Jacob, and it hath lighted upon Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sciet omnis populus Ephraim,  et habitantes Samariam,  in superbia et magnitudine cordis dicentes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָֽדְעוּ֙ הָעָ֣ם כֻּלּ֔וֹ אֶפְרַ֖יִם וְיוֹשֵׁ֣ב שֹׁמְר֑וֹן בְּגַאֲוָ֛ה וּבְגֹ֥דֶל לֵבָ֖ב לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the people of Ephraim shall know, and the inhabitants of Samaria that say in the pride and haughtiness of their heart:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että kaikki Ephraimin kansa ja Samarian asuvaiset pitää sen tietää saaman, jotka ylpeydessä ja korialla mielellä sanovat:
verses.king_james: And all the people shall know, even Ephraim and the inhabitant of Samaria, that say in the pride and stoutness of heart,

verses.latin_vulgate: Lateres ceciderunt, sed quadris lapidibus ædificabimus ;  sycomoros succiderunt, sed cedros immutabimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבֵנִ֥ים נָפָ֖לוּ וְגָזִ֣ית נִבְנֶ֑ה שִׁקְמִ֣ים גֻּדָּ֔עוּ וַאֲרָזִ֖ים נַחֲלִֽיף׃
verses.douay_rheims: The bricks are fallen down, but we will build with square stones: they have cut down the sycamores, but we will change them for cedars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tiilikivet ovat pudonneet, mutta me tahdomme sen rakentaa vuojonkivillä jälleen: Muulbärin puut ovat hakatut maahan, mutta me panemme siaan sedripuita.
verses.king_james: The bricks are fallen down, but we will build with hewn stones: the sycomores are cut down, but we will change them into cedars.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevabit Dominus hostes Rasin super eum,  et inimicos ejus in tumultum vertet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְשַׂגֵּ֧ב יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־צָרֵ֥י רְצִ֖ין עָלָ֑יו וְאֶת־אֹיְבָ֖יו יְסַכְסֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shall set up the enemies of Rasin over him, and shall bring on his enemies in a crowd:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra tahtoo korottaa Retsinin sotaväen heitä vastaan, ja heidän vihollisensa nivoa yhteen,
verses.king_james: Therefore the Lord shall set up the adversaries of Rezin against him, and join his enemies together;

verses.latin_vulgate: Syriam ab oriente, et Philisthiim ab occidente ;  et devorabunt Israël toto ore.  In omnibus his non est aversus furor ejus,  sed adhuc manus ejus extenta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲרָ֣ם מִקֶּ֗דֶם וּפְלִשְׁתִּים֙ מֵאָח֔וֹר וַיֹּאכְל֥וּ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּכׇל־פֶּ֑ה בְּכׇל־זֹאת֙ לֹא־שָׁ֣ב אַפּ֔וֹ וְע֖וֹד יָד֥וֹ נְטוּיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Syrians from the east, and, the Philistines from the west: and they shall devour Israel with open mouth. For all this his indignation is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.
verses.finnish_biblia: Syrialaiset eteen ja Philistealaiset taa, että he söivät Israelin täydellä suulla. Näissä kaikissa ei lakkaa vielä hänen vihansa, vaan hänen kätensä on vielä ojennettu.
verses.king_james: The Syrians before, and the Philistines behind; and they shall devour Israel with open mouth. For all this his anger is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et populus non est reversus ad percutientem se,  et Dominum exercituum non inquisierunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָעָ֥ם לֹא־שָׁ֖ב עַד־הַמַּכֵּ֑הוּ וְאֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת לֹ֥א דָרָֽשׁוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the people are not returned to him who hath struck them, and have not sought after the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei myös kansa käännä itseinsä hänen tykönsä, joka heitä lyö, eikä kysy Herraa Zebaotia.
verses.king_james: For the people turneth not unto him that smiteth them, neither do they seek the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et disperdet Dominus ab Israël caput et caudam,  incurvantem et refrenantem, die una.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּכְרֵ֨ת יְהֹוָ֜ה מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֗ל רֹ֧אשׁ וְזָנָ֛ב כִּפָּ֥ה וְאַגְמ֖וֹן י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shall destroy out of Israel the head and the tail, him that bendeth down, and him that holdeth back, in one day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden karsii Herra Israelilta pois, yhtenä päivänä, pään ja hännän, oksat ja kannon.
verses.king_james: Therefore the Lord will cut off from Israel head and tail, branch and rush, in one day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Longævus et honorabilis, ipse est caput ;  et propheta docens mendacium, ipse est cauda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זָקֵ֥ן וּנְשֽׂוּא־פָנִ֖ים ה֣וּא הָרֹ֑אשׁ וְנָבִ֥יא מֽוֹרֶה־שֶּׁ֖קֶר ה֥וּא הַזָּנָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The aged and honourable, he is the head: and the prophet that teacheth lies, he is the tail.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhat kunnialliset ihmiset ovat pää; mutta prophetat, jotka opettavat väärin, ovat häntä.
verses.king_james: The ancient and honourable, he is the head; and the prophet that teacheth lies, he is the tail.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erunt qui beatificant populum istum, seducentes ;  et qui beatificantur, præcipitati.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽהְי֛וּ מְאַשְּׁרֵ֥י הָֽעָם־הַזֶּ֖ה מַתְעִ֑ים וּמְאֻשָּׁרָ֖יו מְבֻלָּעִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they that call this people blessed, shall cause them to err: and they that are called blessed, shall be thrown down, headlong.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä tämän kansan johdattajat ovat pettäjät, ja ne, jotka sallivat itsensä johdattaa, ovat kadotetut.
verses.king_james: For the leaders of this people cause them to err; and they that are led of them are destroyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc super adolescentulis ejus non lætabitur Dominus,  et pupillorum ejus et viduarum non miserebitur :  quia omnis hypocrita est et nequam,  et universum os locutum est stultitiam ;  in omnibus his non est aversus furor ejus,  sed adhuc manus ejus extenta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֨ן עַל־בַּחוּרָ֜יו לֹא־יִשְׂמַ֣ח ׀ אֲדֹנָ֗י וְאֶת־יְתֹמָ֤יו וְאֶת־אַלְמְנוֹתָיו֙ לֹ֣א יְרַחֵ֔ם כִּ֤י כֻלּוֹ֙ חָנֵ֣ף וּמֵרַ֔ע וְכׇל־פֶּ֖ה דֹּבֵ֣ר נְבָלָ֑ה בְּכׇל־זֹאת֙ לֹא־שָׁ֣ב אַפּ֔וֹ וְע֖וֹד יָד֥וֹ נְטוּיָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore the Lord shall have no joy in their young men: neither shall he have mercy on their fatherless, and widows: for every one is a hypocrite and wicked, and every mouth hath spoken folly. For all this his indignation is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden ei Herra taida iloita heidän nuorista miehistänsä, eikä armahda heidän orpolapsiansa ja leskiänsä; sillä he ovat kaikki ulkokullatut ja pahat, ja jokaisen suu puhuu hulluutta; näissä kaikissa ei lakkaa vielä hänen vihansa, vaan hänen kätensä on vielä ojennettu.
verses.king_james: Therefore the Lord shall have no joy in their young men, neither shall have mercy on their fatherless and widows: for every one is an hypocrite and an evildoer, and every mouth speaketh folly. For all this his anger is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.

verses.latin_vulgate: Succensa est enim quasi ignis impietas :  veprem et spinam vorabit,  et succendetur in densitate saltus,  et convolvetur superbia fumi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־בָעֲרָ֤ה כָאֵשׁ֙ רִשְׁעָ֔ה שָׁמִ֥יר וָשַׁ֖יִת תֹּאכֵ֑ל וַתִּצַּת֙ בְּסִֽבְכֵ֣י הַיַּ֔עַר וַיִּֽתְאַבְּכ֖וּ גֵּא֥וּת עָשָֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For wickedness is kindled as a fire, it shall devour the brier and the thorn: and shall kindle in the thicket of the forest, and it shall be wrapped up in smoke ascending on high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä jumalatoin meno on sytytetty niinkuin tuli, ja kuluttaa orjantappurat ja ohdakkeet; joka palaa niinkuin paksussa metsässä, ja nostaa savun korkialle.
verses.king_james: For wickedness burneth as the fire: it shall devour the briers and thorns, and shall kindle in the thickets of the forest, and they shall mount up like the lifting up of smoke.

verses.latin_vulgate: In ira Domini exercituum conturbata est terra,  et erit populus quasi esca ignis ;  vir fratri suo non parcet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּעֶבְרַ֛ת יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת נֶעְתַּ֣ם אָ֑רֶץ וַיְהִ֤י הָעָם֙ כְּמַאֲכֹ֣לֶת אֵ֔שׁ אִ֥ישׁ אֶל־אָחִ֖יו לֹ֥א יַחְמֹֽלוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: By the wrath of the Lord of hosts the land is troubled, and the people shall be as fuel for the fire: no man shall spare his brother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä maa on pimennyt Herran Zebaotin vihasta; niin että kansa on niinkuin tulen ruoka, ja ei yksikään armaitse toista.
verses.king_james: Through the wrath of the Lord of hosts is the land darkened, and the people shall be as the fuel of the fire: no man shall spare his brother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et declinabit ad dexteram, et esuriet ;  et comedet ad sinistram, et non saturabitur ;  unusquisque carnem brachii sui vorabit :  Manasses Ephraim, et Ephraim Manassen ;  simul ipsi contra Judam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגְזֹ֤ר עַל־יָמִין֙ וְרָעֵ֔ב וַיֹּ֥אכַל עַל־שְׂמֹ֖אול וְלֹ֣א שָׂבֵ֑עוּ אִ֥ישׁ בְּשַׂר־זְרֹע֖וֹ יֹאכֵֽלוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall turn to the right hand, and shall be hungry: and shall eat on the left hand, and shall not be filled: every one shall eat the flesh of his own arm: Manasses Ephraim, and Ephraim Manasses, and they together shall be against Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos he ryöstävät oikialla puolella, niin he nälkää näkevät; jos he syövät vasemmalla puolella, niin ei he tule ravituksi: jokainen syö käsivartensa lihaa.
verses.king_james: And he shall snatch on the right hand, and be hungry; and he shall eat on the left hand, and they shall not be satisfied: they shall eat every man the flesh of his own arm:

verses.latin_vulgate: In omnibus his non est aversus furor ejus,  sed adhuc manus ejus extenta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְנַשֶּׁ֣ה אֶת־אֶפְרַ֗יִם וְאֶפְרַ֙יִם֙ אֶת־מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה יַחְדָּ֥ו הֵ֖מָּה עַל־יְהוּדָ֑ה בְּכׇל־זֹאת֙ לֹא־שָׁ֣ב אַפּ֔וֹ וְע֖וֹד יָד֥וֹ נְטוּיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: After all these things his indignation is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.
verses.finnish_biblia: Manasse Ephraimia, Ephraim Manassea, ja ne molemmat yhdestä puolesta Juudaa vastaan. Ei vielä näissä kaikissa hänen vihansa asetu, vaan hänen kätensä on vielä ojennettu.
verses.king_james: Manasseh, Ephraim; and Ephraim, Manasseh: and they together shall be against Judah. For all this his anger is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.
